holdings.infoBox: GREK is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are National Bank of Greece stock at 15.03%, Eurobank at 12.03%, Piraeus Bank at 11.46%, Alpha Bank at 7.25%, and Public Power Corporation at 6.59%.

overview.description: The Global X MSCI Greece ETF (GREK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI All Greece Select 25-50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of about 15 Greek firms. GREK was launched on Dec 7, 2011 and is issued by Global X.
